name: 12pc Glass Potomac Double Old-Fashioned Assorted Tumbler Set - Threshold™: Recycled Glassware Set, Dishwasher-Safe
description:
Show your traditional style of serving to guests with this 12-Piece Glass Potomac Double Old-Fashioned Assorted Tumbler Set from Threshold™. This 12-piece tumbler set includes both tall and short tumblers to meet all your serving needs. Featuring a simple design with slightly curved bottom, this old-fashioned tumbler set features green hues for lively appeal on the table. Use this glass tumbler set to serve juices, fresh-squeezed lemonade or any other refreshing drink to your party guests during gatherings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
